'''鈭歡-ch-r''' ('''kagachar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultracentrifugate|ultracentrifugate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultracentrifugate|ultracentrifugate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagachar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigachar|thigachar]] || [[word:jigachar|jigachar]] || [[word:shigachar|shigachar]] || [[word:kigachar|kigachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugachar|thuthugachar]] || [[word:jujugachar|jujugachar]] || [[word:shushugachar|shushugachar]] || [[word:kukugachar|kukugachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugachar|thugachar]] || [[word:jugachar|jugachar]] || [[word:shugachar|shugachar]] || [[word:kugachar|kugachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugachar|thugachar]] || [[word:jugachar|jugachar]] || [[word:shugachar|shugachar]] || [[word:kugachar|kugachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegachar|thegachar]] || [[word:jegachar|jegachar]] || [[word:shegachar|shegachar]] || [[word:kegachar|kegachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogachar|thothogachar]] || [[word:jojogachar|jojogachar]] || [[word:shoshogachar|shoshogachar]] || [[word:kokogachar|kokogachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogachar|thogachar]] || [[word:jogachar|jogachar]] || [[word:shogachar|shogachar]] || [[word:kogachar|kogachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogachar|thogachar]] || [[word:jogachar|jogachar]] || [[word:shogachar|shogachar]] || [[word:kogachar|kogachar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]] || [[word:gachar|gachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gachar|th忙gachar]] || [[word:j忙gachar|j忙gachar]] || [[word:sh忙gachar|sh忙gachar]] || [[word:k忙gachar|k忙gachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagachar|thathagachar]] || [[word:jajagachar|jajagachar]] || [[word:shashagachar|shashagachar]] || [[word:kakagachar|kakagachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagachar|thagachar]] || [[word:jagachar|jagachar]] || [[word:shagachar|shagachar]] || [[word:kagachar|kagachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagachar|thagachar]] || [[word:jagachar|jagachar]] || [[word:shagachar|shagachar]] || [[word:kagachar|kagachar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagachar|shagachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagachar|goshagachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagachar|gokishagachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagacharn眉|shagacharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagacharnkn眉|goshagacharnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagacharn眉|gokishagacharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagacharsh毛|shagacharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagacharnksh毛|goshagacharnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagacharsh毛|gokishagacharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagacharro|shagacharro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagacharnkro|goshagacharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagacharro|gokishagacharro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagacharmu|shagacharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagacharnkmu|goshagacharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagacharmu|gokishagacharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagacharsher|shagacharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagacharnksher|goshagacharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagacharsher|gokishagacharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagacharng|shagacharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagacharnkng|goshagacharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagacharng|gokishagacharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagacharya|shagacharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagacharnkya|goshagacharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagacharya|gokishagacharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagacharyam|shagacharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagacharnkyam|goshagacharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagacharyam|gokishagacharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagacharn眉sh毛|shagacharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagacharnkn眉sh毛|goshagacharnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagacharn眉sh毛|gokishagacharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagacharn眉ro|shagacharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagacharnkn眉ro|goshagacharnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagacharn眉ro|gokishagacharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagacharn眉mu|shagacharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagacharnkn眉mu|goshagacharnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagacharn眉mu|gokishagacharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagacharsh毛n眉|shagacharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagacharnksh毛n眉|goshagacharnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagacharsh毛n眉|gokishagacharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagacharsh毛ro|shagacharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagacharnksh毛ro|goshagacharnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagacharsh毛ro|gokishagacharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagacharsh毛mu|shagacharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagacharnksh毛mu|goshagacharnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagacharsh毛mu|gokishagacharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagacharron眉|shagacharron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagacharnkron眉|goshagacharnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagacharron眉|gokishagacharron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagacharrosh毛|shagacharrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagacharnkrosh毛|goshagacharnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagacharrosh毛|gokishagacharrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagacharromu|shagacharromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagacharnkromu|goshagacharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagacharromu|gokishagacharromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagacharmun眉|shagacharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagacharnkmun眉|goshagacharnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagacharmun眉|gokishagacharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagacharmush毛|shagacharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagacharnkmush毛|goshagacharnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagacharmush毛|gokishagacharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagacharmuro|shagacharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagacharnkmuro|goshagacharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagacharmuro|gokishagacharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
